terms_to_ground.thinnest_admissible_read: The irreducible distinction (Constraint C04) forced by finitude (N bound) when an admissible probe separates states into distinguishable equivalence classes. It is the cost threshold where further refinement paths split.
terms_to_ground.axis_0_polarity: Homeostatic (deviation suppression). Maximizes partition stability under perturbation.

dual_engine_mechanics.left_spinor: Outer loop (Low Impedance/Deductive): separates classical-like distinguishable macroscopic states. Inner loop (High Impedance/Inductive): tests for hidden correlations.
dual_engine_mechanics.right_spinor: Outer loop (Low Impedance/Inductive): proposes new correlations across the boundary. Inner loop (High Impedance/Deductive): culls invalid partitioned states.

terms_to_ground.thinnest_admissible_read: The scalar count S(gamma) of surviving refinement paths. It tracks the magnitude of interaction between equivalence classes without requiring global metrics.
terms_to_ground.axis_0_polarity: Allostatic (diversity increase). Maximizes survivable path exploration until the cost bounds kappa are met.

dual_engine_mechanics.left_spinor: Diversity is consumed. Narrowed quickly on the outer deductive loop, deeply extracted on the inner inductive loop.
dual_engine_mechanics.right_spinor: Diversity is generated. Broadly explored on the outer inductive loop, filtered on the inner deductive loop.
